---
layout: cv
title: Aaron Hyde's Resume
---
# Aaron Hyde
Economics Major Data Science Minor at BYU - Idaho


<div id="webaddress">
<a href="aaronhyde636@gmail.com">aaronhyde636@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/aaron-m-hyde/">My LinkedIn page</a>
</div>


## Currently

Student at Brigham Young University - Idaho studying to major in economics with a minor in data science


## Education

January 2024 - July 2027
Brigham Young University - Idaho

## Skills Aquired:
 - R Studio
 - Python
 - Microsoft PowerBI
 - SQL
 - Microsoft Excel




## Occupation

`1600`
__Royal Mint__, London

- Warden
- Minted coins

`1600`
__Lucasian professor of Mathematics__, Cambridge University



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
